name: Enphase Energy, Inc.
summary: PART I Enphase Energy, Inc. | 2025 Form 10-K | 6 Table of Contents Our Company We are a global energy technology company originally founded in March 2006. We deliver smart, easy-to-use solutions that manage solar generation, storage and communication on one platform. Our intelligent microinverters work with virtually every solar panel made, and when paired with our smart technology, result in one of the industrys best-performing clean energy systems.
